props.text: Boost Your Vacation-Rental Revenue with MyAllocator
The all-in-one booking engine built for short-term rental pros

listItems.text: Earn up to 20% more per booking with smart dynamic pricing and commission-free reservations.
Control the guest journey from first click to check-out on your own direct-booking website.
Keep calendars perfectly in sync across Airbnb, Booking.com, Vrbo, and every major OTA, no double-bookings, ever.
Turn first-time guests into loyal fans with automated messages, upsells, and personalized offers.

props.text: Built for Every Type of Stay

items.answer: We provide a lightweight iframe or link that drops into any website, instantly turning your site into a fully fledged vacation-rental reservation system, no coding required.
items.question: How Does The MyAllocator Booking Engine Work?

items.answer: Running your own direct-booking site boosts revenue, protects you from OTA policy changes, and lets you collect guest data for future marketing.
items.question: Why Use A Dedicated Booking Engine?

items.answer: Absolutely. Paste our embed code or link into WordPress, Wix, Squarespace, or any custom site and start accepting secure, commission-free bookings in minutes.
items.question: Can I Integrate MyAllocator With A Existing Website?

items.answer: Our plan is $9/ month for one property and includes the full booking engine, channel manager, and automation suite.
